title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Puma India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Puma India
jsonLd.description:
Puma India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
